_comment: Adapter-creek deploy-test exclusions. Merged with Next.js's canonical test/deploy-tests-manifest.json via NEXT_EXTERNAL_TESTS_FILTERS. Only for tests that can't run on this adapter — never for regressions or flakes.

rules._exclude_note: Upstream Turbopack regression at the pinned canary: JSX inside a workspace-pkg `.js` file fails to parse. Vanilla `next build` fails identically; webpack builds it cleanly. Clears when the canary lands the fix.
